zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Crawford於1482年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼時，他的父親Malcolm Crawford21歲，母親Marion Crichton18歲。他於1524年與Helen Campbell在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Crawford于1482年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼时，他的父亲Malcolm Crawford21岁，母亲Marion Crichton18岁。他于1524年与Helen Campbell在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Crawford was born in 1482, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm Crawford, was 21 and his mother, Marion Crichton, was 18. He married Helen Campbell in 1524, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Crawford est né en 1482, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Crawford, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marion Crichton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Helen Campbell en 1524, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Crawford 1482 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Crawford 21 und seine Mutter Marion Crichton 18. Er hat 1524 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crawford è nato il nel 1482 nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm Crawford, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Marion Crichton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Helen Campbell nel 1524, nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Crawfordが1482年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで生まれた時，父Malcolm Crawfordは21歳，母Marion Crichtonは18歳であった。1524年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでHelen Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Crawford(이)가 1482년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Crawford(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Crichton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Helen Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crawford nasceu em 1482, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm Crawford, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Marion Crichton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Campbell em 1524, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Crawford родился в 1482 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm Crawford было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marion Crichton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Campbell в 1524 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Crawford nació en 1482, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malcolm Crawford, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Marion Crichton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Helen Campbell en 1524, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
